name: CRK - 进入竞技场
notes: Rough operation macro: tap battle/world entry, tap arena entry, then confirm list. Replace with a real recording after coordinate review.

name: CRK - 竞技场挑战槽位 1
notes: Rough operation macro: tap slot 1 challenge, then tap battle/start on the preparation screen.

name: CRK - 竞技场挑战槽位 2
notes: Rough operation macro: tap slot 2 challenge, then tap battle/start on the preparation screen.

name: CRK - 竞技场挑战槽位 3
notes: Rough operation macro: tap slot 3 challenge, then tap battle/start on the preparation screen.

name: CRK - 竞技场横向翻页
notes: Rough operation macro: horizontal swipe over the arena opponent strip from right to left.

name: CRK - 竞技场领取结算奖励
notes: Rough operation macro: tap through battle result/reward confirmation.

name: CRK - 竞技场返回列表
notes: Rough operation macro: tap back/top-left and acknowledge if a transition overlay appears.
